title: 2 Terminology
body_text:
2	Terminology
2.1	Definitions
Biller
A Biller is an entity that is set up on Central 1âs Electronic Bill Payments System to receive member-initiated bill payments that are made through participating financial institutions.
Client Centre
The Client Centre is a digital portal that provides secured access to Central 1âs applications and to information and news about our products and services.
Client Centre Users
Client Centre Users log in to the Client Centre to access certain applications. Client Centre Users canât manage CPS Admin Security Officers or other Client Centre Users.
CPS Admin
The Central Portal System (CPS) Admin application is used to add, edit, and delete Client Centre Users and CPS Admin Security Officers.
CPS Admin Security Officer
CPS Admin Security Officers use the CPS Admin or the User Management application to add, edit, and delete Client Centre Users. They can also delete and modify other CPS Admin Security Officers (with some exceptions) via the User Management application. CPS Admin Security Officers use the Client Centre to log in to certain applications.
Electronic Bill Payments System
Central 1âs Electronic Bill Payment System allows participating financial institutionsâ members to make electronic bill payments to various Billers.
OLT
The Online Tracing System is an application that allows authorized users to create bill payment trace requests and view Biller-initiated trace requests.
SuperTracer
SuperTracers can create trace requests and view Biller-initiated trace requests. They also authorize trace requests created by Tracers.
ServiceNow
ServiceNow is the web-based ticketing application used to report service issues, request changes to existing services, or submit questions to Central 1.
Tracer
Tracers can create trace requests and view Biller-initiated trace requests. Authorization is required for trace requests created by Tracers.
User Management
User Management is an application used to add, edit, and delete Client Centre Users. It is also used to edit and delete other CPS Admin Security Officers and to manage 2-step security tokens. Eventually, User Management will replace CPS Admin.
END
